name: Moroccan Chickpeas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté the onions in water with 1/4 tablespoon of veggie broth until translucent.
2. Add the chick peas and enough cold water (or canned tomatoes) to cover them.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients: bay leaf, garlic, onion, parsley, cinnamon stick, ginger, turmeric, and pepper.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer until the chick peas are tender, about 1 hour.
5. Add raisins to taste.
6. Serve with brown basmat rice or enjoy on its own.
